**Product Features**  
**âOverSpeed Technologyâ â Increase your swing speed with face control**

Primary Features

1. **âThe SpeedTracâ** â Y-shaped face allows for clubface training *while* speed training (e.g., place weight on heel if a slicer to help train your impact position to be square *while* working on gaining speed)  
     
2. **âSpeedTrac Stackâ** â Overspeed (lighter) and overload (heavier) training options as well as a neutral location; five weights (2 lighter, 1 neutral, 2 heavier) per location \= 15 options for both speed and clubface control (*together or separately*)  
     
3. **âSpeed Spoonâ** â Weighting resembles a real club with non-axial weighting (unlike other aids) & mini-driver visual look

Secondary Features

1. Training grip: for proper hand placement while increasing your speed and accuracy  
2. âPG OverSpeed Shaftâ offered in regular or stiff flex: for players of slower and faster swing speeds  
3. Screwed shaft (not glued): for attaching your shaft to the SpeedTrac head and swinging with the grip and shaft youâre accustomed to â**TBD on offer for big four shaft-compatibility (i.e., Titleist, Ping, Callaway, TaylorMade)**  
4. âOpen Crownâ head: for easy weight adjustment  
5. âZip & Flipâ weight pouch: for storage and transportation of adjustable weights

**\*Note that SpeedTrac is not meant for hitting balls (foam at most but not the intention)**
